title: Tracing of Mixed Design (Verilated & SystemC both)
body:
---


Author Name: **Muhammad Aurang Zaib**
Original Redmine Issue: 267 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2010-06-28
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Hi,

I have a mixed Design with Verilated module & SystemC module.

I am generating trace file for verilated modules as suggested in its documentation through VerilatedVCDC file

pointer & then dumping the data in the trace file.

Is it possible that i can dump the data from SystemC module which are parallel in hierarchy to those

Verilated module into the same trace file.

I think as SystemC modules don't contain that trace function as it is available for verilator through -trace swtich,

so i can't use the same VerilatedVCDC pointer to access SystemC module.

Is there any way out? Else i have to generate a separate trace file for SystemC module.   

Thanks
